'''vangudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iboga|iboga]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-ng-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iboga|iboga]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vangudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vængidith|vængidith]] || [[word:vængidij|vængidij]] || [[word:vængidish|vængidish]] || [[word:vængidi|vængidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vangunguduth|vangunguduth]] || [[word:vangunguduj|vangunguduj]] || [[word:vangungudush|vangungudush]] || [[word:vangungudu|vangungudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vanguduth|vanguduth]] || [[word:vanguduj|vanguduj]] || [[word:vangudush|vangudush]] || [[word:vangudu|vangudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vangufdufth|vangufdufth]] || [[word:vangufdufj|vangufdufj]] || [[word:vangufdufsh|vangufdufsh]] || [[word:vangufduf|vangufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vanguduthu|vanguduthu]] || [[word:vanguduju|vanguduju]] || [[word:vangudushu|vangudushu]] || [[word:vanguduku|vanguduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vanguduth|vanguduth]] || [[word:vanguduj|vanguduj]] || [[word:vangudush|vangudush]] || [[word:vangudu|vangudu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vanguduthul|vanguduthul]] || [[word:vangudujul|vangudujul]] || [[word:vangudushul|vangudushul]] || [[word:vangudukul|vangudukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vanguduuthuthu|vanguduuthuthu]] || [[word:vanguduujuju|vanguduujuju]] || [[word:vanguduushushu|vanguduushushu]] || [[word:vanguduuku|vanguduuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vanguduthun|vanguduthun]] || [[word:vangudujun|vangudujun]] || [[word:vangudushun|vangudushun]] || [[word:vangudukun|vangudukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vanguduthuoro|vanguduthuoro]] || [[word:vangudujuoro|vangudujuoro]] || [[word:vangudushuoro|vangudushuoro]] || [[word:vangudukuoro|vangudukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
